_comment: ntfy plugin config for the test harness. The 'server' is the harness's
ntfy container reachable on the Docker bridge by name; 'topic' matches
what the operator opens in the host browser at http://localhost:8080/<topic>.
notifyAfter uses shorthand duration ('3s' = 3 seconds) so the harness
loop can validate the wait window quickly. fetchTimeout same shape.
